headline: William Blair Initiates Cardinal Health at Outperform: Is the Pharma Distributor a Stealth Compounder?
summary: William Blair launched coverage of Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) with an Outperform rating today, framing the pharma distributor as a durable franchise with specialty-led upside. The firm simultaneously initiated McKesson (NYSE:MCK) at Outperform, a dual launch that signals conviction in the U.S. drug-distribution oligopoly.
